title: Intermediate Baking Techniques
description: Master the basics of baking with this lesson. Learn about measuring ingredients accurately, mixing techniques, and baking times.

steps.instruction: Gather all your ingredients: flour, sugar, eggs, and butter.
Preheat your oven to the required temperature.
Measure ingredients accurately using cups and spoons.
Mix dry ingredients separately before combining with wet ingredients.
Pour the batter into a baking dish and bake for the specified time.

safety: Be careful when handling hot baking trays and ensure proper oven safety.
